chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.46 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case [Priority] 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.177 of 2024 10.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Azad Khan, Advocate for Applicant ************ On the last date of hearing, following order was passed_ “It appears that office has wrongly fixed this matter for non-prosecution as bailiff report is on record whereby, Respondent No.2 stands duly served. Insofar as Respondent No.1 is concerned, repeat notice upon Respondent No.1 through TCS, whereas, tracking report be placed on record. Adjourned. To come up on 10.03.2025. Interim order passed earlier to continue till next date of hearing.” Record reflects that earlier also compliance was not made and as an indulgence, a weeks’ time was allowed. In view of such position, this Special Customs Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
